testcase.name: tearDown

error.message: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver.quit()" because the return value of "testBase.BaseClass.getDriver()" is null

testcase.name: validate_reset_password_email

failure.message: No matching messages found in time. By default, only messages received in the last hour are checked (use receivedAfter to override this).

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: No matching messages found in time.
